---
title: ""
pagetitle: "FAM PhD Talks — Davide Rolfi"
---

# FAM PhD Talks

<p class="page-intro">
FAM PhD Talks is a monthly research seminar series at Bayes Business School, co-founded to create a regular forum for doctoral students and faculty members to present research, exchange feedback, and strengthen the PhD research community.
</p>

## About the Initiative

::: {.paper-card .featured-paper}

<span class="paper-label">Monthly · Bayes Business School</span>

### Research seminars for the PhD community

FAM PhD Talks brings together PhD students and faculty members across research areas for regular research presentations and discussion. The series provides a space for doctoral researchers to present work in progress, receive feedback, and engage with methodological and conceptual questions beyond their immediate research group.

As co-founder and organiser, I help coordinate the series, including speaker planning, scheduling, event communication, and the development of a regular forum for PhD research exchange.

:::

## Event Archive

<div class="event-grid">

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2026-may.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2026-may.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · May 2026 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">15 May 2026</p>
<h3>May Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Inka Luhrs · Dr Emina Ademovic · Meleah Oleche · Dr Alessandro Giudici</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2026-april.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2026-april.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · April 2026 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">16 April 2026</p>
<h3>April Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Yuri Lee · Srinivasa Narasimhan Ananthan · Zahra Abootalebi Naeini · Dr Angela Gallo</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2026-march.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2026-march.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · March 2026 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">19 March 2026</p>
<h3>March Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Luca Luigi Alberici · Emilio Luis Saenz Guillen · Mikaela Murekian · Dr Mattia Magnaghi</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2026-february.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2026-february.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · February 2026 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">20 February 2026</p>
<h3>February Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Anand Shekhar · Ziwei Chen · Kabir Joshi · Matthew O'Brien</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2026-january.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2026-january.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · January 2026 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">16 January 2026</p>
<h3>January Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Richard Blades · Aakif Rahman · Zahra Abootalebi Naeini · Matteo Samarani</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2025-december.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2025-december.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · December 2025 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">12 December 2025</p>
<h3>December Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Chrysa Gotsi · Daniel Norouzi Mohassab · Yue Zhang · Dr Russell Gerrard</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="event-card">
<a href="images/fam/fam-2025-november.pdf">
<img src="images/fam/fam-2025-november.jpg" alt="FAM PhD Talks · November 2025 flyer" loading="lazy">
</a>
<div class="event-card-text">
<p class="event-date">19 November 2025</p>
<h3>November Edition</h3>
<p class="event-speakers">Lienze Peng · Zheng Zhang · Filippo Rizzato</p>
</div>
</div>

</div>
